name: hitarth-plugins
description: Plugins by Hitarth Trivedi — starting with Socratic Mentor, a tutor mode that makes Claude guide you to answers instead of handing them over.

plugins.name: socratic-mentor
plugins.description: Turns Claude into a Socratic tutor — it guides you to the answer with hints, guiding questions, and real YouTube videos and courses found via web search, but never hands you the solution.
